changes_summary: Revised plan adds three fixes that were missing: (1) `useSelectedMediaClips` now reads `generationId` from asset registry entries so timeline clips carry it, not just gallery clips. (2) `attachSelectedClips` now preserves `generationId` and `prompt` on turn attachments. (3) New `recoverSelectedClipsFromTurns` helper reconstructs `selectedClips` on continuation calls by reading the last user turn's attachments, so the agent doesn't lose clip context mid-conversation. Step 9 (optional polish) is now Step 7 (required), and the frontend fix is the new Step 1.

success_criteria.criterion: useSelectedMediaClips includes generationId from asset registry entries for both image and video clips
SelectedClipPayload includes optional `prompt` field and enrichment populates it from the generations table when generation_id is present
Enrichment query is efficient: single batch query for all generation_ids, not N+1
attachSelectedClips stores generationId and prompt on turn attachments for session persistence
On continuation (no selectedClips provided), runAgentLoop reconstructs clips from the most recent user turn's attachments
buildSelectedClipsPrompt includes prompt text in the clip description when available
System prompt includes concise guidance on multi-image handling for style-transfer vs image-to-video
All existing tests in selectedClips.test.ts, clips.test.ts, loop.test.ts, and command-parser.test.ts pass
New tests cover: enrichClipsWithPrompts (happy path, no generation_id, null params, empty array), recoverSelectedClipsFromTurns, and buildSelectedClipsPrompt with prompt metadata
Prompt extraction matches the hierarchy used elsewhere (orchestrator_details.prompt > params.prompt > metadata.prompt)
AgentTurn attachment type includes optional prompt field for history display
System prompt additions are concise (under 5 lines of new guidance)
End-to-end manual test: select 2 timeline images, send to agent, verify system prompt shows both prompts and generationIds

assumptions: The `generations` table is accessible via supabaseAdmin with service role key (same as existing shot_generations queries)
The prompt field lives primarily in `params.prompt` or `params.originalParams.orchestrator_details.prompt` — matching the extraction hierarchy in generationTransformers.ts
The SupabaseAdmin type's `.in()` method works on the generations table the same way it works on shot_generations
Enrichment happens once at edge function entry, not on every loop iteration — continuation reconstructs from stored turn attachments instead

Recovered clips from turn attachments won't have `prompt` unless they were stored with it — but they will have `generationId`, which is sufficient for the `create_task` shot-resolution path. Prompt in system prompt is a nice-to-have on continuation; the critical path is tool execution.
The `AssetRegistryEntry.generationId` is reliably populated for generated images on the timeline (not user-uploaded assets)
